title: Soul Split
description: This mod adds a new weapon The Soul Scythe which has the power to split the soul and body of any player.
body:
![Soul Split Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad453ff453cfe16ddaaf4de389f100a743d4b831_0.webp)

Once upon a time, players found a weapon The Soul Scythe it had unimaginable powers, as it could split a players soul and body.

After a player started misusing it, they found the Lightforged Greatsword using which the fough against the Soul Scythe.
## Main Info
This mod adds the Soul Scythe as the main weapon, it can turn a player into a ghost.
The Lightforged Greatsword was made as a counter weapon to the Soul Scythe.

## Structures: 
- The Soul Trials
- The Fallen Ruins
- The Fair Forge
- The Prismarite Tree
- Zeus's Cloud

## Weapons
- Soul Scythe
- Lightforged Greatsword
- Hammer of Justice (Bound to the player who crafted it)
- Prismapiercer (Bound to the player who crafted it)

For info on which structure gives you which weapon visit the gallery.


For info on how to get the weapon, click on it's crafting block.

Required mods: Satin API

<details>
<summary>Weapon Details [SPOILER]</summary>

|        Weapon       |      Atk. Damage      |      Atk. Speed       |        Ability       |
|---------------------|:---------------------:|:---------------------:|---------------------:|
| Soul Scythe | 12 | 1.6 | Call the Soul Storm |
| Lightforged Greatsword | 11 | 0.8 | Call the Lightning of Zeus |
| Hammer of Justice | 16 | 0.1 | Set near entities on fire |
| Prismapiercer | 7 | 2.8 | Teleport inflicted players to spawn (0,0) or when holding prismarite shard in offhand creates the prismarite dagger which can steal a player soul from a players inventory by damaging them. |

</details>


<details>
<summary>Reincarnaion of a player [SPOILER]</summary>

To reincarnate a player use their soul on the reincarnation block.

</details>

### Special thanks goes to the EOS Astral build server, Notaradish and Hunt_Mind for allowing me to use some of their builds.

(If a player's soul is somehow destroyed it is attempted to respawn them)
